title: Priam (starship)

{{Quote|Protect our boarding craft as they storm the Frigate ''Priam'' and capture it.|A Rebel briefing led by Admiral Gial Ackbar|<ref name="XW" />}}
The '''''Priam''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] which served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ship was stationed near [[Kalla VII]] in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. In need of repairs, it traveled to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base near Kalla VII to find the base destroyed during an [[Battle of Kalla VII|attack]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. With the ''Priam'' stranded in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], the Rebels mounted a series of strikes that resulted in its capture.

==Description==
The ''Priam'' was a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]],<ref name="XW" /> designed to help defend [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoys from attack by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].<ref name="NEGVV">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> Like other [[Starship/Legends|ships]] of its class, it was 300 meters in length and comprised a main section, connected to a smaller propulsion module by a slender neck. It had an array of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight engines]] located at the rear of the propulsion module and was fitted with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] for travel through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The vessel had [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] for defense<ref name="XW" /> and was armed with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries for use against [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and a [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] to target fast-moving starfighters.<ref name="NEGVV" />

Nebulon-B frigates had [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] space for two full [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of starfighters<ref name="NEGVV" /> and the ''Priam'' carried a complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. It also carried at least three [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] and at least two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]].<ref name="XW" />

==History==
===Arrival at Kalla VII===
The ''Priam'' was stationed near [[Kalla VII]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|43|Priam}}</ref> a major Imperial offensive against the Alliance to Restore the Republic in the months prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="XW" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="0BBY">''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' establishes that the events of [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]{{'s}} third tour of duty take place between the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|capture of Leia Organa]] and the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Both of these events occur in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> after Operation Strike Fear was defeated, Rebel [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] acted as part of a plan by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] to destroy the Imperial repair dock at Kalla VII and leave Imperial ships on the way to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] stranded in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] and open to capture. As Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] were preparing to leave after an [[Battle of Kalla VII|attack]] on the facility, the ''Priam'' arrived in need of repairs.<ref name="XW" /> The frigate collided with Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Breth Gart]]'s ship as it existed hyperspace, killing him instantly, but the other Rebels escaped, leaving the ''Priam'' caught in their trap.<ref name="XW:TOSG">''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref> With the ''Priam'' now stranded the Rebels prepared to move against it.<ref name="XW" />

===Escorts===
{{Quote|Attack the ships providing escort for the Frigate ''Priam''. Your Y-wings will try to destroy the Corvette escort. The A-wings will concentrate on destroying the TIE fighters. Beware of the minefield that is surrounding the Frigate ''Priam''.|A Rebel briefing led by Admiral Gial Ackbar|<ref name="XW" />}}
[[File:KallaVII-XW.png|thumb|left|250px|Rebel Y-wings attacking the ''Priam'']]
At some point after its initial contact with the Rebels, the ''Priam''{{'s}} escorts arrived in the form of three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] from ''[[Dar Es]]'' group. They would be charged with protecting the stranded vessel. To aid with the defenses, a [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]] was also quickly deployed around the ship. A ''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport was also dispatched to deliver supplies and personnel.<ref name="XW" />

The Rebels, meanwhile, prepared an assault to remove these defenses. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] led a briefing for the assault aboard the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']], a [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] of the Rebellion. Two [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] were to engage the ''Priam''{{'s}} [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]]<ref name="XW" /> while two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], Gart's flight leader in the previous mission,<ref name="XW:TOSG" /> were to destroy the corvettes with their [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].<ref name="XW" />

All three corvettes were quickly destroyed, as was the incoming transport<ref name="XW:TOSG" /> and the Rebels withdrew leaving only the minefield and a handful of TIEs to defend the ''Priam''.<ref name="XW" /> One R-22 was lost during the battle but a subsequent rescue operation retrieved the pilot who had been able to eject.<ref name="XW:TOSG" />

===Capture of the ''Priam''===
{{Quote|Your A-wing is to destroy mines and provide cover for the Y-wings that are disabling the Frigate ''Priam''.|A Rebel briefing led by Admiral Gial Ackbar|<ref name="XW" />}}
With the escort destroyed, General Dodonna gave the order for [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] to conduct a "board and capture" operation against the ''Priam''. Aboard the ''Defiance'', Admiral Ackbar again briefed the Rebel starfighters on the mission.<ref name="XW" /> The Rebels sent a complete squadron of Y-Wings from [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] to disable the ''Priam'', attacking in two groups of six. Keyan Farlander, having just returned to the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] from the previous mission, immediately launched to support the operation, flying the only craft available, an R-22 Spearhead.<ref name="XW:TOSG" />

Farlander moved quickly to destroy the few remaining TIE/LN starfighters before they could pose a threat to the Y-wings and then proceeded to destroy the minefield while the Y-wings used their [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] to disable the ''Priam''. The ''Priam'' made one last attempt to fight back, launching two TIE/sa bombers but they too were quickly destroyed.<ref name="XW:TOSG" />

[[File:PriamBoarding-XW.png|thumb|right|250px|The ''Priam'' is boarded by Rebel shuttles.]]
After losing relatively few Y-wings, the ''Priam'' was finally disabled. The Y-wings withdrew while the Special Forces team moved in with transports from [[Assault (transports)|''Assault'']] group carrying commandos to board the frigate. Once captured, Lambda-class shuttles from [[Panda (transports)|''Panda'']] group delivered the new crew for the ship while transport group ''[[Jordi]]'' delivered supplies. Once all the transports were aboard, the Rebel forces, along with the newly captured frigate, jumped to hyperspace. Despite Farlander having not been scheduled to fly in the mission, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Lagrane]] acknowledged during his debriefing that his actions had helped keep Rebel losses lower than expected.<ref name="XW:TOSG" />

The journals of ''Priam''{{'s}} computer revealed to the Alliance that the location of the Death Star was [[Despayre]]. Corvette group ''[[Ethar]]'' was dispatched to the [[Horuz system/Legends|Horuz system]] to investigate.<ref name="XW" />

The final stage of the ''Priam''{{'s}} capture was later recreated as a training mission for pilots learning to use the new [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]]. The training scenario gave Red Squadron the responsibility of disabling the frigate, while a lone R-22 from Blue Squadron took Farlander's place. However, Red Squadron were allocated B-wings with which to disable the frigate, instead of the Y-wings used by Gold Squadron in the original mission. The aim of the scenario was to demonstrate that, by using the B-wing instead of the Y-wing, the same objective could be achieved with fewer ships.<ref name="XW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Priam'' was created for the [[1993]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]. The ship appeared in three missions during "The Gathering Storm," the game's third tour of duty; "Destroy Imperial Base," "Destroy ''Priam''{{'s}} Escort," and "Capture the Frigate ''Priam''."<ref name="XW" /> The final mission was reproduced using B-wings as a training mission in the game's [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing|''B-wing'' expansion pack]].<ref name="BW">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{C|Simulation only}}
